news.summary: Japan is seeing an increase in train stations serving as parcel hubs as Quadient and JR East Smart Logistics collaborate to expand smart locker capabilities. This collaboration has led to a significant growth in the number of smart lockers available at train stations across the country. The number of smart lockers has increased by X%, reaching a total of Y lockers installed. This move aims to improve the efficiency of parcel delivery services and meet the growing demand for convenient delivery options. With this expansion, more commuters and residents in Japan will have access to secure and convenient parcel collection points at train stations, enhancing overall customer experience in the logistics sector.
news.headline: Quadient and JR East Smart Logistics are expanding smart locker capabilities at train stations in Japan, turning them into parcel hubs.

Their headquarters are located at 1973 Boulevard de la Défense in Nanterre, France. The company is registered under the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under the number 552 037 806. More information can be found on their website at www.vinci.com.
news.headline: French public company has €1,454,542,075.00 share capital with 552,037,806 voting rights as of 30 June 2025.

news.summary: In New York, JLens, a Registered Investment Advisor sponsoring the JLens 500 Jewish Advocacy U.S. ETF (NYSE: TOV), alongside the Anti-Defamation League (ADL), the top anti-hate organization, denounce the recent report by UN Special Rapporteur Francesca Albanese at the 59th session of the UN Human Rights Council. The report, named "From economy of occupation to economy of genocide," recommends businesses cut connections with Israel and cease operations.
news.headline: JLens and ADL denounce UN report targeting companies for Israel ties, titled "From economy of occupation to economy of genocide."

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an innovative flood barrier system was introduced by an inventor from Dunedin, Florida. The system, named REVERSE MOTE, can be easily deployed by a certified construction contractor with the press of a button. The inventor aimed to create an efficient solution to tackle floods and ensure protection. The mechanism offers a new approach to flood prevention and mitigation. It represents a significant advancement in disaster preparedness, with the potential to safeguard countless individuals and properties.
news.headline: Inventor from Dunedin, Fla. develops new flood barrier system REVERSE MOTE for easy deployment by construction contractors.

news.summary: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ: FAST) is set to unveil its second-quarter earnings before the market opens on July 14. Analysts predict earnings per share at 28 cents, showing growth from 25 cents from the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $2.07 billion, up from $1.92 billion a year ago. This information comes from Benzinga Pro. Recently, on April 23, Fastenal declared a two-for-one stock split. Despite this news, Fastenal shares dropped by 0.4% to $42.68 at the close of Wednesday's trading session. Readers eager for more details can access the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page. This information can be sorted by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, or other criteria, providing a comprehensive view of market data.
news.headline: Fastenal (NASDSAQ: FAST) earnings expected on July 14: 28 cents/share, revenue $2.07 billion; stock split announced; shares at $42.68.

news.summary: The upcoming Prime Day 2025 by Amazon.com, Inc. presents a potential record-breaking event, as projected by Bank of America to reach a massive $21 billion in sales within a compressed timeframe of four days, marking a remarkable 60% surge from the previous year’s already remarkable results. In a strategic move, Amazon has extended this year’s Prime Day proceedings to span over 96 hours, from July 8 to July 11, aiming to enhance consumer interaction and stimulate a prolonged shopping frenzy. Noteworthy statistics from the past underline the magnitude of this event, with U.S. Prime Day sales in 2024 amounting to $14.2 billion, demonstrating a trend where nearly half of transactions were completed through smartphones, while the average order size approximated $58.
news.headline: Amazon Prime Day 2025 projected to generate $21 billion in sales, a 60% increase from last year's $14.2 billion haul.

news.summary: Experienced crypto analyst DonAlt expresses bullish sentiment towards Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP despite worries about seasonal market trends. In a recent podcast on July 2, he highlighted Bitcoin's stable consolidation near crucial resistance levels, suggesting a possible significant breakthrough. Disregarding geopolitical uncertainties and seasonal factors, DonAlt emphasized the importance of $95,000 as a vital monthly support level for Bitcoin, stating that as long as this mark is maintained, he remains optimistic. DonAlt underscored BTC's impressive performance and potential for growth, affirming his positive outlook for the market.
news.headline: Trader DonAlt remains bullish on BTC, ETH, XRP despite summer blues. Critical support at $95,000 key for Bitcoin.

news.summary: As of July 3, 2025, in Las Vegas, the Dr. Hazem Afifi Scholarship for Medical Students has opened its doors for applications from potential healthcare professionals nationwide in the United States. Dr. Hazem Afifi founded this scholarship program, showcasing his enduring commitment to supporting the educational pursuits of students in the medical field. This initiative aims to provide financial aid to students to further their studies and careers in healthcare.
news.headline: Dr. Hazem Afifi starts scholarship for U.S. medical students - accepting applications nationwide.

news.summary: Applications for the Dr. Louis Krenn Medical Scholarship are currently open for students pursuing medical careers in the United States. The scholarship, introduced by Dr. Louis Krenn, aims to encourage and assist students dedicated to healthcare. Interested individuals can now apply for this esteemed award which offers financial assistance to deserving applicants.
news.headline: Dr. Louis Krenn Medical Scholarship open for aspiring medical professionals across US, aiming to inspire & support students.

news.summary: An aviation company has reported a decline in revenue for the third quarter of this year. The company's revenue decreased by 15% compared to the same period last year, amounting to $1.2 billion. This decline has been attributed to a decrease in air travel demand due to the ongoing pandemic. Additionally, the company experienced a net loss of $150 million for the quarter. Despite cost-cutting measures, the company struggled to offset the impact of reduced travel. The CEO expressed optimism for a gradual recovery in the upcoming quarters.

news.summary: Cobblestone in Greenville, North Carolina is set to introduce budget-friendly new townhomes, supported by the company's efficient online purchasing system. Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a prominent national homebuilder known for its online home sales expertise, will be leading this initiative. The launch will take place on July 3, 2025, emphasizing affordable housing options in the sought-after location of Greenville.
news.headline: Century Communities will launch affordable new townhomes in Greenville, NC, providing online buying options.

news.summary: In a recent report by The Insight Partners, it was revealed that the photovoltaic market is anticipated to grow significantly, with a projected market size of USD 1,145.70 billion by 2031, up from USD 450.0 billion in 2024. This growth represents a forecasted Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.03% expected during the period of 2025 to 2031.
news.headline: Photovoltaic market to reach USD 1,145.70 billion by 2031 from USD 450.0 billion in 2024; CAGR of 13.03% predicted.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025 in Pittsburgh, a new sesame butter product has been introduced, sparking innovation in the food sector. The goal was to develop a sesame butter variant with distinctive flavors and nutritional benefits to enhance different dishes. This creation is intended to be a versatile option for a wide range of meals, snacks, and recipes, such as hummus. The product aims to cater to diverse tastes and dietary preferences, reflecting the evolving trends in the culinary world.
news.headline: Inventor creates sesame butter with unique taste and nutrition profile for versatile uses in meals.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, a private equity firm named Saothair Capital Partners, LLC (Saothair) based in Wayne, Pennsylvania, revealed the completion of fundraising for Saothair Fund II, L.P. The fund secured $300 million in its final closing. Saothair specializes in investing in middle-market manufacturing and industrial firms.
news.headline: Saothair Capital Partners closes Fund II, raising $300 million for middle-market manufacturing investments.

news.summary: In a significant move, Governor Dan McKee has recently signed into effect House Bill No. 5023 Sub A and Senate Bill No. 474 as amended, creating the Rare Disease Advisory Council. This development has been met with praise from the Rare Access Action Project (RAAP), as it marks a crucial step towards addressing the needs of individuals living with rare diseases. The establishment of this council will play a vital role in advancing awareness and support for those affected by rare diseases.
news.headline: Rhode Island establishes Rare Disease Advisory Council; Governor signs House Bill No. 5023 Sub A and Senate Bill No. 474.

RECESSION ODDS COLLAPSE TO 19% ON KALSHI Kalshi markets now price just a 19% chance of a US recession in 2025, down nearly 30 points from earlier this year. After a spike in recession bets during April's growth scares, markets have steadily unwound as soft-landing hopes build.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Pittsburgh, the board of directors of The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.70 per share for common stock, reflecting a $0.10 per share increase from the previous quarter. This represents a 6% rise from the second quarter dividend amount of $1.60 per share. The company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the symbol PNC.
news.headline: PNC increases common stock dividend to $1.70 per share, up 6% from $1.60 per share.

news.summary: The latest report on Application Performance Monitoring (APM) has been released, revealing that the global market is currently valued at approximately US$9.5 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to grow at a CAGR of 13.8% from 2024 to 2030, reaching an estimated US$20.6 billion by the end of the forecast period. The report provides a detailed analysis of the market on a global and regional scale, focusing on factors like components, deployment, and organization.
news.headline: APM market to hit $20.6 billion by 2030, with 13.8% CAGR. Cloud-native APM in demand for scalable monitoring.

news.summary: In a recent report by The Insight Partners released on July 3, 2025, it was revealed that the secure logistics market is experiencing robust growth. This growth can be attributed to the increasing utilization of artificial intelligence within the logistics sector, the continuous expansion of the logistics industry, and the rising demand for secure logistics services. The market is witnessing significant advancements, with key factors such as technological integration and industry expansion driving this growth.Specific details regarding the growth rate, market size, and projected trends were outlined in the report. The integration of artificial intelligence has been identified as a crucial factor contributing to the growth of the secure logistics market. Moreover, the expanding scope of the logistics industry and the heightened need for secure transportation of goods have further fueled the market's expansion.Overall, the report indicates a positive outlook for the secure logistics market, emphasizing the importance of technological advancements and increasing demand. As per the findings, the market is poised for continued growth in the coming years, with a focus on innovation and meeting the evolving needs of the logistics sector.
news.headline: Secure logistics market expected to reach USD 84.39 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 5.2% due to AI integration.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, a long-time barber with 25 years of experience from Seffner, FL, highlighted the significance of convenient and trustworthy hygiene procedures. The inventor shared the creation of the MSDA, a device designed to simplify cleaning and sanitizing surfaces. The device aims to enhance hygiene practices, specifically focusing on ensuring ease and reliability in maintaining cleanliness.
news.headline: Inventor from Seffner, FL invents MSDA for barbershops - convenient and reliable hygiene; worked as barber for 25 years.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in New York, a promotional and informational campaign called "Exploring European Cheestories with Spanish cheeses" was highlighted. This campaign was organized by the Interprofessional Dairy Organization (InLac) with backing from the European Union. It achieved a significant milestone by engaging in a promotion that aimed to showcase the diverse range of cheeses from Spain. The campaign aimed to increase awareness and appreciation for these cheeses, and it received attention in the media for its innovative approach.
news.headline: European cheeses showcased at 'Summer Fancy Food' in New York, highlighting cheeses from Spain with EU support.

news.summary: A report on Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, indicating significant growth in the global market. The BESS market size is expected to increase at a CAGR of 21.3% from 2024 to 2030, with projections showing it will reach US$43.4 billion by 2030, up from US$13.7 billion in 2024. The report analyzes the market based on Element/Component, Battery Type, Power Rating, etc.
news.headline: Global BESS market to grow at 21.3% CAGR from 2024-2030, reaching $43.4 billion from $13.7 billion in 2024.
